summary.summary: Adds an explicit "initiating" bolus state and updates UI and models to show when a bolus is initiating. The change introduces a BolusStatus model (file:ea8335ef1db5 / commit:aaf921a5fe3a) and adds an initiating state to the TreatmentView (commit:5a26db0ab814). The PR description explains the purpose: the Tandem Mobi can take ~5s between accepting a bolus command and actual progress, so the bolus progress view should reflect the initiating phase (pr:gordolio/Trio#1211). Supporting changes wire the new status through Treatments and Home state/views and device/APS managers (files:243583eb346b, 68d95205f2b4, 41aada787118, 3e0ec8bf55e7, fd972cd0e61b, ff1c6c26999d), and localizations were updated (file:aa1fdb7da2f4). Project file entries were also modified to include the new/updated sources (file:a4004047d405, diff:a8a877dd3977). (commit:aaf921a5fe3a; commit:3db59429401c; commit:5a26db0ab814; commit:c898d2ddeffa; commit:a963c3d9ae92; commit:ef15212c882b; commit:5792ad7ade3a; commit:44d119561cf9; commit:4333da70b008)
summary.userFacingImpact: The bolus progress UI will show an "initiating" state when a bolus has been accepted but not yet begun progressing, intended to represent short delays (noted ~5s for Tandem Mobi) between command acceptance and progress (pr:gordolio/Trio#1211; commit:5a26db0ab814). This is an interface change only in the provided diffs; there is no explicit evidence in the supplied sources that dosing logic or safety behavior was altered beyond adding the new display state (file:ea8335ef1db5; diff:a8a877dd3977).
